examples: His footballing skills and extrovert personality won the hearts of the public.
We make a grave mistake to embrace the Extrovert Ideal so unthinkingly.
The archetypal extrovert prefers action to contemplation, risk-taking to heed-taking, certainty to doubt.
He's an extrovert who wants to thrill us and immerse us in his giddy daring.
Super-stardom had no place in the firm's ethic (even though Siegmund was an extrovert).
